# Ledger of Ash — dist/

This folder contains the generated single-file deployable build.

**Current batch: 27**
**Canon: V28_8**

## Contents

- `index.html` — Single-file deployable (~230 KB). Generated by `build.py` from the active runtime source in `js/`. Open in any modern browser. No server required.
- `assets/` — Static image and audio assets copied from repo root `assets/`.

## Verified runtime scope (current build)

- 31 archetypes
- 93 backgrounds
- 93 route signatures
- 11 V28_8-canonical localities
- Stage I locality grounding: each background starts in its V28_8-canonical locality (not hardcoded Shelkopolis)
- Stage I–V progression with permadeath at Stage V
- Dynamic narrative generation from locality, pressure, hazards, NPCs, and route state
- Notice board, Journal, Map, NPCs, Services, Camp, Sheet, Legends panels
- localStorage save system with 4-digit passcode

## What this build does not claim

- Full authored opening scene text per background (background-locality-map.js handles starting locality routing; per-background prose is procedurally generated from locality data)
- Complete world route graph for all polities
- Full authored Stage III–V content matrix for all 93 backgrounds
- Backend authority / API stack (Phase 2 scope)
- Final balance pass across all 20 levels / 5 stages

## Rebuild

From the repo root:

```bash
python build.py
```

Output overwrites this file. Do not edit `dist/index.html` directly — edit the source files in `js/` and rebuild.
